requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence where accepted by SONCAP, SON, tender, insurer, or project reviewer
requirement_topic.zh: 在SONCAP、SON、招标、保险方或项目审查方接受时适用的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据
requirement_topic.zht: 在SONCAP、SON、招標、保險方或項目審查方接受時適用的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據

summary.en: SON states that Nigerian standards are approved by SON and that SONCAP compliance procedures may use NIS, ISO, IEC, and other approved standards. For BESS, IEC 62619 evidence for industrial secondary lithium cells and batteries and IEC 62933 electrical energy storage system evidence may be requested or accepted in the SONCAP, tender, insurer, or project-review file. The exporter should confirm whether SON has adopted the relevant IEC edition as an NIS or will accept the IEC report as an approved equivalent for the specific shipment.
summary.zh: SON说明，尼日利亚标准由SON批准，SONCAP符合性程序可使用NIS、ISO、IEC及其他认可标准。对于BESS，SONCAP、招标、保险或项目审查文件中可能要求或接受工业用锂二次电芯和电池的IEC 62619证据，以及电能储能系统IEC 62933证据。出口商应确认SON是否已将相关IEC版本采纳为NIS，或是否会针对具体货批接受IEC报告作为认可等效标准。
summary.zht: SON說明，奈及利亞標準由SON批准，SONCAP符合性程序可使用NIS、ISO、IEC及其他認可標準。對於BESS，SONCAP、招標、保險或項目審查文件中可能要求或接受工業用鋰二次電芯和電池的IEC 62619證據，以及電能儲能系統IEC 62933證據。出口商應確認SON是否已將相關IEC版本採納為NIS，或是否會針對具體貨批接受IEC報告作為認可等效標準。

standards_or_laws: Nigerian Industrial Standard or approved equivalent where accepted by SON / SONCAP

summary.en: China-side GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 evidence should be clause-mapped to the IEC edition requested by SONCAP, the Nigerian buyer, the project owner, or the insurer. A Chinese GB report is useful technical support, but it may not satisfy a request for IEC-format testing or an NIS-adopted IEC standard.
summary.zh: 中国侧GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023证据应逐条映射至SONCAP、尼日利亚买方、项目业主或保险方要求的IEC版本。中国GB报告是有用的技术支持，但未必满足IEC格式测试或NIS采标IEC标准的要求。
summary.zht: 中國側GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023證據應逐條映射至SONCAP、奈及利亞買方、項目業主或保險方要求的IEC版本。中國GB報告是有用的技術支持，但未必滿足IEC格式測試或NIS採標IEC標準的要求。

gap.en: Prepare a standards crosswalk that identifies the exact IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 editions, test-lab accreditation, cell chemistry, battery module configuration, BMS protections, thermal propagation evidence, and system-level controls. Get the SONCAP IAF or project reviewer to confirm whether Chinese GB evidence can be used only as support or as an accepted equivalent.
gap.zh: 应准备标准对照表，列明IEC 62619和IEC 62933的具体版本、检测实验室资质、电芯化学体系、电池模组配置、BMS保护、热蔓延证据和系统级控制。应由SONCAP独立认证机构或项目审查方确认中国GB证据仅能作为支持材料，还是可作为认可等效依据。
gap.zht: 應準備標準對照表，列明IEC 62619和IEC 62933的具體版本、檢測實驗室資質、電芯化學體系、電池模組配置、BMS保護、熱蔓延證據和系統級控制。應由SONCAP獨立認證機構或項目審查方確認中國GB證據僅能作為支持材料，還是可作為認可等效依據。

mandatory_status.target: Usually required only where SONCAP, an NIS adoption, tender, insurer, utility, or project approval calls up the IEC evidence; confirm edition and adoption status before treating it as mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly used for BESS battery evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 should be handled as SONCAP or project evidence unless SON, an NIS adoption, or a binding project instrument makes the exact IEC edition mandatory for the shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非SON、NIS采标或有约束力的项目文件将具体IEC版本规定为该货批或安装的强制要求，否则IEC 62619和IEC 62933应作为SONCAP或项目证据处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非SON、NIS採標或有約束力的項目文件將具體IEC版本規定為該貨批或安裝的強制要求，否則IEC 62619和IEC 62933應作為SONCAP或項目證據處理。
